task.name: Generate Changelog
task.objective: Generate changelog from git history and/or sprint status files

critical.mandate: Group by: features, bug fixes, improvements, breaking changes

step.title: Gather Sources
step.action: Check git log for commits since last release tag
Read sprint status files if available in {implementation_artifacts}/
Identify version number for this changelog entry

step.title: Categorize Changes
step.action: Group changes into: Added, Changed, Fixed, Deprecated, Removed, Security
Extract meaningful descriptions from commits and story titles
Identify breaking changes and migration notes

step.title: Format
step.action: Format following Keep a Changelog specification
Add links to relevant PRs or issues if available
